use_cases: Display user profile pictures with fallback initials in dashboard interfaces
Show user online/offline/busy/away status indicators in collaboration tools
Represent team members or customers in card-based layouts
Avatar with indicator badges for notification counts or role markers
User identification in chat, comment, or activity feed components
ai_summary: A versatile Avatar component built on Radix UI primitives with image, fallback, indicator, and status subcomponents. Features four status variants (online, offline, busy, away) using CVA for type-safe prop handling. Provides accessible, rounded avatar display with border styling and absolute-positioned overlay support for badges or indicators.
